matches.snippet: the only once (dia dose Finnados !) he did take a tompip
matches.reasoning: Archaic/garbled spelling of Finnegan(s) with divine invocation 'dia dose' (God willing), evokes the ballad's opening 'Finnegan'; the name folded into Irish exclamation

matches.snippet: the whirling dervish. Tumult, son of Thunder, self exiled in upon his ego
matches.reasoning: Tumult as avatar of Finnegan/HCE through thunder (the thunderwords marking Finnegan's fall); 'son of Thunder' echoes the Thunderbird motif and mythic paternity; linked to the Shaping fall
